properties.PROP_HEADING: Commercial plot / Land for sale in Ranjanpada, Navi Mumbai

properties.DESCRIPTION:
The city and industrial development corporation of maharashtra (Cidco) is the special planning authority for the khopta new town area. Cidco has published a development plan for six of the villages, which were approved by the government of maharashtra in 2012: Barpada, karnala-Tara, dolghar, kasarbhat, and dighati. 
The development plan for the remaining 26 villages will need to comply with the unified development control promotion regulations. Cidco has requested the gram panchayats to provide information about the villages to help draft the plan. The plan will also consider expanding the villages. 
The development plan will be prepared in accordance with the maharashtra regional and town planning act, 1966. The plan will be submitted to the government of maharashtra for approval.
